name_cn:
Genuine quality
New stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Shaomai Bag
CE 2024 new Shaomai bag, small size but big capacity. Classic monogram and white monogram which is super suitable for summer. Signature print, calfskin trim, fabric lining, drawstring leather strap, 1 main compartment, adjustable shoulder strap. Umbrella, phone, power bank all fit 👯‍♀️
Style No.: 10M742
Color: White material / Yellow-brown (with original packaging)
Size: 13.5x17.5x11cm
